examples: Billy: Here. Here's a barf bag.
Juno, did you by any chance barf in my urn?
Brain barf all over the page to give your thoughts mass and range.
Force me to walk -- with tubes in their noses, barf buckets resting on tricycle handlebars, beads of courage clinking from their IV poles.
When it came time to decide on my next smartphone the thought of having to learn a whole new device was making me barf.
